_meta.scope: steps 0-7 (auth -> capabilities -> params-to-commands -> param-defaults -> ucp-review -> params-to-capabilities)
_meta.note: All auth/param decisions made autonomously per connectus-migration-SKILL.md. Low-confidence calls flagged with 'confidence' and 'flags'. set-auth forces interpolated:true on every profile.

auth.name: EdgeGrid
auth.reason: Akamai EdgeGrid signing uses 3 co-equal tokens (clientToken+accessToken+clientSecret) via EdgeGridAuth at Akamai_WAF.py:7447. No dominant canonical role -> Passthrough per skill 1.2.2a. interpolated:true forced by set-auth.
auth.notes: Old flat type:4 params (clientToken/accessToken/clientSecret) are hidden:true -> excluded; only the visible type:9 credentials .password leaves mapped (hiddenusername:true suppresses .identifier).

ucp_param_default_review.fix: Akamai_WAF.py:7437 proxy = params.get("proxy", False) (behavior-preserving; BaseClient consumes proxy truthily)

auth.name: EdgeGrid
auth.reason: EdgeGrid 3-token signing (clienttoken/accesstoken/clientsecret _creds) via EdgeGridAuth at Akamai_SIEM.py:1235. Passthrough per 1.2.2a (3 co-equal tokens). interpolated forced.
auth.notes: Flat type:4 token params hidden:true -> excluded. configIds (required, no default, connection-routing) rejected as a code default and moved to other_connection per branch-b reject rule.

Akamai WAF SIEM.params_to_commands_note: Static analyzer returned empty per-command lists; fetch behavioral params (fetchTime,fetchLimit) added by source review per err-on-inclusion. Hidden:[xsoar] params (page_size,beta_page_size,max_concurrent_tasks,isFetchEvents,should_skip_decode_events,eventFetchInterval) excluded.

fixes: fetch_incidents_command call: fetchTime default 1 hours, fetchLimit default 20
remaining_uncertain_justified: <dynamic> splat @100 = local request params not config

flags: mapper emitted longRunning under Log Collection though it is in default_ignore_params; persisted verbatim as mapper is authoritative for step 7 - review if undesired

auth.name: Service Account
auth.reason: Google service-account JWT: admin_email_creds.identifier=subject email, .password=SA JSON (GSuiteSecurityAlertCenter.py:314). Passthrough (credentials_file/subject flow). interpolated forced.
auth.notes: Flat user_service_account_json (type4) and admin_email (type0) are hidden:true -> excluded.

G Suite Security Alert Center.param_defaults_note: Only max_fetch is required:true; branch(c) code default 15 (line112) == YML default. Other tm params required:false -> excluded.

justified: first_fetch defaulted via if/else DEFAULT_FIRST_FETCH at line103

auth.name: Service Account
auth.reason: GCP service-account JSON keyfile via ServiceAccountCredentials.from_json_keyfile_dict (GCPIAM.py:21). credentials type9 hiddenusername:true -> only .password (SA JSON). Passthrough.

justified: 16 <dynamic> sites are **params splats into Google API client calls (local request dicts, not config)

auth.name: Service Account
auth.reason: Google SA JWT: admin_email_creds.identifier=admin email (subject), .password=SA JSON. Passthrough.
auth.notes: customer_id is connection-level routing -> other_connection. Flat user_service_account_json/admin_email hidden:true excluded.

auth.name: Service Account
auth.reason: Google SA JWT: credentials.password=SA JSON (GsuiteAuditor.py:110), credentials.identifier=admin email (line198). Passthrough.

auth.name: Service Account
auth.reason: Google SA JWT w/ domain-wide delegation: adminEmail.identifier=admin email (subject), .password=SA JSON (Gmail.py:187-190 from_service_account_info+with_subject). Passthrough.

Gmail.params_to_commands_note: analyzer attributed fetch params; fetch_time added to fetch-incidents and legacy_name to mail get/search commands per err-on-inclusion.

justified: queryUserKey optional string read, no strict converter

auth.name: OAuth
auth.reason: OAuth2 Authorization Code flow (user runs gmail-auth-link, supplies auth code). credentials.identifier=Client ID, .password=Client Secret (lines 48-49); auth_code_creds.password=Auth Code (line 42, hiddenusername). Passthrough; test_module returns instructional message and does NOT hit HTTP -> verify_connection_skip:true.
auth.notes: Flat client_id/client_secret/code params hidden:true excluded. email/send_as/redirect_uri are connection-level config -> other_connection.

auth.name: OAuth
auth.reason: OAuth2 ROPC: username+password posted to /oauth/token with grant_type=password (GoogleApigeeEventCollector.py:133), returns Bearer access/refresh tokens. Passthrough per decision table (ROPC).

flags: FIXED: re-ran full analyzer + source review so max_fetch is now routed to Log Collection (previously dropped by single-cap tm-only shortcut).

auth.name: Service Account
auth.reason: GCP SA JSON via credentials_google_service.password (hiddenusername:true). Passthrough. Flat google_service_creds type4 hidden:true excluded.

auth.name: Service Account
auth.reason: GCP SA JSON via credentials_service_account_json.password (hiddenusername:true), from_service_account_info (GoogleCloudCompute.py:167). Passthrough. Flat service type4 hidden:true excluded.

auth.name: Service Account
auth.reason: GCP SA JSON: project_id_creds.identifier=project id, .password=SA JSON; from_json_keyfile_dict (GoogleCloudFunctions.py:36). Passthrough. Flat credentials_json/project_id hidden:true excluded.

justified: region defaulted via kwargs.get(region,'-') line35 + in other_connection

auth.name: Service Account
auth.reason: GCP SA JSON via credentials_service_account_json.password (hiddenusername:true); from_service_account_json (GoogleCloudStorage.py:47). Passthrough. Flat service_account_json type4 hidden:true excluded.

justified: default_bucket used truthily (if default_bucket / args or default_bucket) + in other_connection

auth.reason: JSONFeedApiModule feed integration hitting public Google IP ranges (no credentials). auth_types=[] (NoneRequired). Per skill 1.9.1 feed integrations need no auth secrets.

flags: Feed framework (JSONFeedApiModule); ip_ranges/feed* params are framework-managed.

auth.name: Service Account
auth.reason: GCP SA JSON via credentials_service_account.password (hiddenusername:true) (GoogleKeyManagementService.py:42). Passthrough. Flat service_account type4 hidden:true excluded.

justified: 10 <dynamic> int() calls are on API response fields (res.create_time etc), not config params

auth.name: Service Account
auth.reason: SA JSON assembled from individual fields (GoogleResourceManager.py:20-40): private_key_id_creds.password, private_key_creds.password, client_email_creds.identifier=client_email, client_email_creds.password=client_id. Multiple co-equal secret components -> Passthrough.
auth.notes: Flat private_key_id/private_key/client_email/client_id hidden:true excluded. project_id and client_x509_cert_url are non-secret SA-JSON components -> other_connection.

flags: client_email_creds is a single type:9 widget whose identifier=client_email and password=client_id (unusual labeling per YML display).

auth.name: API Key
auth.reason: API key sent as ?key=<api_key> query param (GoogleSafeBrowsingV2.py:217). api_creds.password=API key, api_creds.identifier=client_id (sent as clientId in request body). Two leaves (key + client_id); client_id is non-canonical role so classified Passthrough rather than APIKey (which only allows role 'key').
auth.confidence_reason: client_id role placement (in profile vs other_connection) is a judgment call; kept in profile because it is part of the auth/client identity sent with each request.

flags: client_id treated as auth-adjacent and kept in profile; alternatively could be other_connection. Review.

auth.name: Service Account
auth.reason: GCP SA JSON via auth_json_creds.password (hiddenusername:true); from_json_keyfile_dict (GoogleVisionAPI.py:50). Passthrough. Flat auth_json type4 hidden:true excluded.

auth.reason: GSuite SA JSON via user_service_account_json_creds.password (hiddenusername:true) (GoogleCalendar.py:266). Passthrough. Flat user_service_account_json type4 hidden:true excluded.

auth.reason: GCP SA JSON via credentials.password (hiddenusername:true) (GoogleCloudLogging.py:35). Passthrough.

auth.reason: GCP SA JSON: project_creds.identifier=project, .password=SA JSON. Passthrough. Flat service_account_json/project hidden:true excluded.

auth.name: Service Account
auth.reason: SA JSON via credentials_service_account.password (hiddenusername:true); from_json_keyfile_dict (GoogleDocs.py:77). Passthrough. Flat service_account_credentials type4 hidden:true excluded.

auth.name: API Key | Service Account
auth.reason: Multi-auth via auth_type selector (GoogleGemini.py:86 branches on AUTH_TYPE_AI_STUDIO). Genuine alternatives (user picks one) -> XOR -> 2 entries. AI Studio: api_key.password used as x-goog-api-key header -> APIKey (role key). Vertex AI: service_account_key.password = SA JSON -> Passthrough.

flags: FIXED: behavioral params (model,max_tokens,temperature,top_p,top_k) now routed to Automation (previously dropped by single-cap tm-only shortcut). All have code defaults (branch c) so no .py edits needed.
auth_type selector kept in other_connection (it drives which XOR profile is active).

auth.name: Service Account
auth.reason: GCP SA JSON via credentials.password (hiddenusername:true); from_service_account_info (GoogleKubernetesEngine.py:79). Passthrough. Flat credentials_json type4 hidden:true excluded.

auth.name: API Key
auth.reason: Single API key via api_key.password (hiddenusername:true) sent as ?key= query param (GoogleMaps.py:26). Single canonical key -> APIKey.

flags: FIXED: error_on_no_results now routed to Automation (previously dropped by single-cap tm-only shortcut).

auth.name: Service Account
auth.reason: GCP SA JSON via credentials.password (hiddenusername:true); from_json_keyfile_dict (GooglePubSub.py:89). Passthrough. Flat service_account_json type4 hidden:true excluded.

GooglePubSub.params_to_commands_note: analyzer returned empty per-command; fetch behavioral params (default_subscription,default_max_msgs,first_fetch_time,ack_incidents) added to fetch-incidents by source review per err-on-inclusion.

justified: init_google_client(**params) splat - named params have signature defaults; isFetch/ack_incidents are None-safe boolean flags; default_max_msgs has YML default 50 and no strict read-site conversion

auth.name: Service Account
auth.reason: SA JSON via service_account_credentials.password (hiddenusername:true); from_json_keyfile_dict (GoogleSheets.py:840). Passthrough.
auth.notes: user_id (email to associate w/ Drive) is connection identity -> other_connection.

auth.name: Service Account
auth.reason: Google Vault SA JWT w/ delegation: gsuite_credentials.identifier=admin email (subject, line22), auth_json_creds.password=SA JSON (line23). Passthrough. Flat auth_json type4 hidden:true excluded.
auth.notes: gsuite_credentials type9 only uses .identifier (admin email); its password leaf unused.

auth.name: Basic Auth
auth.reason: Username+password posted to GuardiCore login endpoint returning an access_token (GuardiCoreV2.py:46 self.login()). Canonical 2-field username/password -> Plain. credentials.identifier=username, .password=password.
auth.notes: timeout is a global request timeout (connection-level). NOTE: connector_id is 'Akamai' per CSV - verify this is correct (GuardiCore is an Akamai product, so likely intentional).

GuardiCore v2.params_to_commands_note: analyzer returned empty fetch-incidents; fetch filter params added by source review per err-on-inclusion.

ucp_param_default_review.new_pattern: multi-select (type:16) param with YML default read bare then used with 'in'/'join' breaks under UCP when absent (None) -> 'All' in None raises TypeError. Fix: params.get(x) or [default-list].
justified: isFetch passed to test_module is None-safe boolean

flags: connector_id='Akamai' in CSV - unexpected for GuardiCore; flagged for review (GuardiCore is Akamai-owned so may be intentional).

auth.name: Client Credentials
auth.reason: OAuth2 client-credentials style: API3 client_id+client_secret POSTed to /login returning access_token (Looker.py:95-101). No user code -> Passthrough. credentials_api3_client.identifier=client_id, .password=client_secret.
auth.notes: Flat client_secret type4 hidden:true excluded. Flat client_id type0 is VISIBLE+required (legacy alt path) but redundant with credentials_api3_client.identifier; mapped the widget leaves only to avoid double-mapping.
auth.confidence_reason: flat visible client_id not placed anywhere (widget identifier covers it); a reviewer may prefer adding flat client_id to other_connection.

flags: flat visible 'client_id' param (type0, required) left unmapped - covered by credentials_api3_client.identifier. Review if it should be in other_connection.
connector_id='Google Cloud' for Looker in CSV - unexpected (Looker is not GCP); flagged for review.
